recommendations.title: Endless Love
recommendations.overview: A privileged girl and a charismatic boy's instant desire sparks a love affair made only more reckless by parents trying to keep them apart.

recommendations.title: Run Sweetheart Run
recommendations.overview: A woman runs for her life though the streets of Los Angeles after her blind date suddenly turns violent.

recommendations.title: The Greatest
recommendations.overview: Teenagers Rose and Bennett were in love, and then a car crash claimed Bennett's life. He left behind a grieving mother, father and younger brother, and Rose was left all alone. She has no family to turn to for support, so when she finds out she's pre

recommendations.title: I Saw the Light
recommendations.overview: Singer and songwriter Hank Williams rises to fame in the 1940s, but alcohol abuse and infidelity take a toll on his career and marriage to fellow musician Audrey Mae Williams.

recommendations.title: Shawn Mendes: In Wonder
recommendations.overview: A portrait of singer-songwriter Shawn Mendes' life, chronicling the past few years of his rise and journey.

recommendations.title: Roger Waters: The Wall
recommendations.overview: A concert film that the former Pink Floyd singer-songwriter made on various tour dates between 2010 and 2013, when he was playing his former group's 1980 double-album in its entirety.

recommendations.title: A Star Is Born
recommendations.overview: Seasoned musician Jackson Maine discovers — and falls in love with — struggling artist Ally. She has just about given up on her dream to make it big as a singer — until Jack coaxes her into the spotlight. But even as Ally's career takes off, the pers

recommendations.title: Bob Marley: One Love
recommendations.overview: Jamaican singer-songwriter Bob Marley overcomes adversity to become the most famous reggae musician in the world.

recommendations.title: Once
recommendations.overview: A vacuum repairman moonlights as a street musician and hopes for his big break. One day a Czech immigrant, who earns a living selling flowers, approaches him with the news that she is also an aspiring singer-songwriter. The pair decide to collaborate

recommendations.title: Kiss and Cry
recommendations.overview: A romantic drama based on the story of Carley Allison, a promising 18 year old figure skater and singer who made medical history in her fight against a rare 1 in 3.5 billion type of sarcoma.
